overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving through a rainy, neon-lit urban downtown at night. The vehicle navigates multi-lane streets with moderate traffic, passing under overpasses and through intersections while rain streaks across the windshield and neon signs reflect off the wet pavement.

events.description: making right turn at intersection while following traffic

agents.ego_description: driving through rainy city streets following the flow of traffic, hands visible on steering wheel

notable_agents.action: car ahead with red brake lights illuminated, moving slowly in traffic

tall commercial building with purple and blue neon accent lighting
concrete highway overpass spanning across the road ahead

tall street lamps with bright white illumination lining the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The dashboard glows with illuminated controls while neon-lit buildings line the left side of the wide multi-lane road. The vehicle approaches and navigates a right turn at an intersection, with an overpass visible ahead and street lights reflecting off the wet pavement.

events.description: entering covered underpass with concrete walls and ceiling
exiting underpass back to open street with increased neon visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersections and underpasses, maintaining steady speed through varying lighting conditions

notable_agents.action: oncoming vehicle with bright headlights approaching in the opposite lane

entered.detail: concrete tunnel with overhead lighting creating enclosed driving environment
large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics on building facade
concrete divider separating opposing traffic lanes
commercial building with continuous neon lighting along roofline and windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete underpass with artificial lighting, transitioning from the open street environment. Digital billboards and neon-trimmed buildings become visible upon exiting the tunnel. The road features concrete barriers separating lanes, and the vehicle passes an oncoming car with bright headlights while navigating through the urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and pedestrian activity

events.description: pedestrians become visible walking on sidewalks alongside the street
slowing down at intersection while navigating through moderate traffic

agents.ego_description: cruising through commercial district with neon storefronts, observing pedestrians on sidewalks while maintaining traffic flow

vehicle ahead slowing down at the intersection, brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: floating three-dimensional holographic display projecting above street level
raised concrete sidewalk with pedestrians walking past commercial entrances
covered entrance to building with illuminated signage and glass doors
massive vertical digital billboard displaying animated advertisements on building

segments.scene_description: Driving through a bustling commercial district, the scene features holographic advertisements floating above the street and pedestrians walking along raised sidewalks. The vehicle slows at an intersection while navigating past storefronts with illuminated canopies and large digital screens. Tall skyscrapers with glass facades line the left side of the medium-width street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with tall buildings on both sides

events.description: entering densely built urban canyon with buildings close on both sides
slight steering adjustment while maintaining speed through narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense urban canyon with tall buildings creating a narrow corridor, maintaining steady course

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright clothing walking on sidewalk near building entrance

entered.detail: tall building facade creating left wall of urban canyon with multiple stories
tall building facade creating right wall of urban canyon with neon signage
dense collection of overlapping neon signs and illuminated advertisements
architectural corner of building with detailed facade and lighting fixtures
extended fabric awning over sidewalk with integrated lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The final segment drives through a narrow urban canyon with tall buildings pressing in on both sides, creating an enclosed corridor effect. Dense clusters of neon signage illuminate the right side while architectural details of corner buildings pass by on the left. The wet pavement continues to reflect the myriad light sources as the vehicle maintains its course through the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis, transitioning from wide, open intersections into a dense, enclosed urban canyon. It begins inside a futuristic vehicle navigating a wide multi-lane road, where the glow of the dashboard complements the neon buildings and wet pavement before the car makes a right turn. As the vehicle enters a concrete underpass, the open city gives way to artificial tunnel lighting, eventually emerging back into the open air past digital billboards and oncoming headlights. The scene then expands into a bustling commercial district filled with floating holographic advertisements and pedestrians on raised sidewalks, passing beneath the glass facades of towering skyscrapers. Finally, the road narrows into a tight corridor of tall buildings that press in from both sides, with dense clusters of neon signage reflecting off the shimmering pavement as the vehicle drives deeper into the city.
